mapper.select: SELECT * FROM life_event_config ORDER BY event_type, weight DESC
SELECT * FROM life_event_config WHERE event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY weight DESC
SELECT * FROM life_event_config WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY event_type, weight DESC
SELECT * FROM life_event_config WHERE status = 1 AND event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY weight DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE life_event_config SET event_type = #{eventType}, event_name = #{eventName}, event_description = #{eventDescription}, icon = #{icon}, color = #{color}, impact_type = #{impactType}, impact_value = #{impactValue}, weight = #{weight}, min_days = #{minDays}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
